headline: Why The Story Around Wizz Air (LSE:WIZZ) Is Shifting As Analysts Reset Valuation Expectations
summary: Wizz Air Holdings has seen its central Fair Value estimate revised from £13.43 to £11.53, a reduction of around 14% that puts a fresh spotlight on where analysts think the shares belong. This move comes as research houses pull price targets in different directions, with some trimming levels in stages while others hold higher targets or upgrade ratings, reflecting an ongoing debate about how much is already priced in. Read on to see how you can track these shifting targets and make sense of...
